title: Wolf Dagger 3pc American Flag Knife Collector Set
description:
This patriotic 3pc Wolf Dagger Collector's Set displays beautiful artwork and craftsmanship, and would make a great gift for any knife collector, dagger enthusiast, and/or red blooded American. This collector's set features a black design, white design, and American flag design that have all been acid etched for extra appeal. All three daggers depict a majestic wolf that is sure to impress friends and visitors. The blade of the daggers is 7" in length and is made from strong 440 Stainless Steel. The total knife length is 13.75" from point to pommel. Makes a great gift!

Wolf Dagger 3pc American Flag Knife Collector Set

This patriotic 3pc Wolf Dagger Collector's Set displays beautiful artwork and craftsmanship, and would make a great gift for any knife collector, dagger enthusiast, and/or red blooded American.

Key Features

  • SPECIAL EDITION DECORATIVE KNIFE: These wild animal daggers are quite the addition to any knife collection set: The Animal Head Fixed Blade Hunting Daggers feature an intricate outdoor graphic design of their spirit in full color from scabbard and handle
  • PREMIUM QUALITY CRAFTSMANSHIP: Constructed from 440 stainless steel these fixed blade animal head knives have an eye catching and heavy weighted 8 inch acid etched blade while overall being 13.75 inches in length
  • ORNAMENTAL POMMEL AND SHEATH: From tip to pommel a matching wild animal outdoor graphic adorns this stainless steel dagger in full color that will surly impress one and all. Each fixed blade animal head dagger has a 5.5" handle with a solid ornamental animal head pommel full color graphic scabbard and handle
  • WILDLIFE FIXED BLADE DECORATIVE COLLECTORS KNIFE: Included in this 3 piece knife collection is a Wolf, Eagle, and Fantasy Dragon ornamental dagger each a unique character in the wild
  • UNIQUE AND ENJOYABLE: Makes a great addition to any knife collection or wildlife enthusiast center piece

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRWBUNG21
  • UPC: 601887902243
  • Color: 3pc Wolf Set
  • Size: 13.5 in

This collector's set features a black design, white design, and American flag design that have all been acid etched for extra appeal. All three daggers depict a majestic wolf that is sure to impress friends and visitors.

The blade of the daggers is 7" in length and is made from strong 440 Stainless Steel. The total knife length is 13.75" from point to pommel.

Makes a great gift!
